working_on: Phase 1.1 prompt-pack Session 11 — historical maximum tracking: settle stored high-water mark vs recomputation for the decay floor's proficiency precondition; land an ADR.
outcome_summary: Closed prompt-pack Session 11. ADR 0025 settles historical maximum tracking: max_historical_score on the existing mastery_snapshots table (per ADR 0015), defined as the asymptotic cap on cumulative undecayed raw strength over substantive interaction types (excludes incidental_mention and backward_inference, mirroring ADR 0023's edge-case treatment). docs/learner-model.md Stage 3 pseudocode and historical-maximum-tracking paragraph updated. Phase 1.1 fully closed (Sessions 9, 10, 11 settled across S-0004/S-0005/S-0006). validate.py clean (9 checks, 0 hard fails, 0 soft warns).
